description: Flushing Acupuncture was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: to provide accessible, high-quality Traditional Chinese Medicine care to the New York community.
What started as a small practice has grown into a trusted wellness center, helping over 1,000 patients achieve better health naturally.
clinic.environment: Our clinic provides a peaceful, welcoming environment designed to promote relaxation and healing. From the moment you enter, you'll feel the difference - calming colors, comfortable treatment rooms, and a warm, friendly atmosphere that puts patients at ease.

journey.story:
Founded in 2006, Flushing Acupuncture emerged from Dr. Jiang's deep commitment to bringing authentic Traditional Chinese Medicine to the vibrant, multicultural community of Flushing, New York. Having witnessed the profound healing potential of TCM during her own family's health journey, Dr. Jiang was inspired to create a sanctuary where ancient wisdom meets modern wellness needs.

For eighteen years, our clinic has become a cornerstone of holistic health in Queens, serving patients from all walks of life who seek natural, effective alternatives to conventional treatments. We've watched children grow into adults, supported families through health challenges, and celebrated countless healing victories alongside our patients.

Rooted in the rich cultural tapestry of Flushing, we honor both traditional Chinese healing practices and the diverse healthcare needs of our community. Our bilingual approach ensures that every patient feels understood and comfortable, whether they prefer to communicate in English or Chinese, creating a bridge between Eastern wisdom and Western accessibility.
journey.title: My Journey to Chinese Medicine

profile.bio:
Dr. Jiang – Professional Biography

Dr. Jiang received systematic training in Traditional Chinese Medicine in China early in her career. She graduated from Beijing University of Chinese Medicine in 1996, after completing a five-year undergraduate program in Traditional Chinese Medicine. This medical curriculum covered a wide range of disciplines, including TCM theory, Chinese herbal medicine, and acupuncture, and represented a comprehensive professional medical education.

After coming to the United States, Dr. Jiang continued her studies in molecular biology and biostatistics, earning a master’s degree in a related field. Following graduation, she worked for approximately five years at a major pharmaceutical company, where she was involved in biomedical research and related professional work.

Although she had promising career opportunities in the biomedical field, Dr. Jiang always maintained a deep interest in Traditional Chinese Medicine, Chinese herbal medicine, and acupuncture. After careful consideration, she ultimately decided to return to the medical path she had originally loved, obtained the relevant licenses, and began practicing clinically in TCM and acupuncture.

Drawing on her background in both Traditional Chinese Medicine and modern biological sciences, Dr. Jiang emphasizes a holistic approach in clinical treatment. Through acupuncture and herbal medicine, she aims to help patients improve their health and enhance their quality of life.

Through many years of clinical practice, Dr. Jiang has accumulated extensive treatment experience. She has developed a mature and steady diagnostic and treatment approach for the management of various common conditions and chronic illnesses. Over the years, she has successfully helped many patients improve their health. She has a wealth of similar treatment cases, and many patients, after experiencing significant improvement or even full recovery, have expressed high praise for both her medical skill and professional ethics.

Throughout her long-term clinical work, many patients have remained in contact with Dr. Jiang after recovery, sharing life changes with her out of gratitude, and some have even become trusted friends. This recognition and trust from her patients have also become an important source of motivation for Dr. Jiang to continue dedicating herself to Traditional Chinese Medicine and to keep refining her medical expertise.

Dr. Jiang firmly believes that Traditional Chinese Medicine is not only a form of medicine, but also a holistic philosophy of healing that helps people restore balance in body and mind and improve their quality of life. Through her professional knowledge and experience, she hopes to help more patients achieve health, peace of mind, and well-being.

> When we support the body's natural wisdom with ancient healing principles, profound transformation becomes possible.

**Dr. Jiang**
profile.name: Dr. Jiang
profile.title: L.Ac., NCBAHM

philosophy.title: Treatment Philosophy

principles.title: Treat the Whole Person
principles.description: TCM recognizes that physical symptoms are often connected to emotional, mental, and spiritual factors. Dr. Jiang addresses all aspects of health, not just isolated symptoms.

principles.title: Find the Root Cause
principles.description: Rather than merely suppressing symptoms, treatment focuses on identifying and addressing the underlying imbalances that create disease. This approach leads to lasting results.

principles.title: Personalized Care
principles.description: No two patients are alike. Each treatment plan is carefully customized based on your unique constitution, health history, and current condition.

principles.title: Patient Education
principles.description: Understanding your body and condition empowers you to take an active role in your healing. Dr. Jiang takes time to explain your diagnosis and treatment in clear, accessible terms.

principles.title: Integration with Western Medicine
principles.description: TCM can work beautifully alongside conventional medical care. Dr. Jiang collaborates with other healthcare providers to ensure comprehensive, coordinated treatment.

principles.title: Prevention & Wellness
principles.description: The best medicine prevents illness before it occurs. Treatment includes guidance on diet, lifestyle, and self-care practices to maintain long-term health.

philosophy.introduction: Dr. Jiang's approach to healing is rooted in the fundamental principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine while incorporating modern clinical understanding.

items.institution: National Certification Board for Acupuncture and Herbal Medicine

specializations.title: Areas of Specialization
specializations.description: Through years of clinical practice and continuing education, Dr. Jiang has developed particular expertise in several key areas:

items: Classical Chinese Herbal Medicine seminars with Dr. Heiner Fruehauf
Annual attendance at national TCM conferences
Regular study groups with local TCM practitioners
30+ hours of continuing education annually (required: 30 hours every 3 years)
